thing-type.label: Rachio Schedule Rule
thing-type.description: A fixed Rachio sprinkler schedule rule.

parameter.name: scheduleRuleId
parameter.label: Schedule Rule ID
parameter.description: Rachio API schedule rule UUID. Required for manually created schedule Things.

channel-type.label: Enabled
channel-type.description: ON if the schedule rule is enabled.

channel-type.label: Start Time
channel-type.description: Schedule rule start time from Rachio startDate, with startTime used as a fallback when present.

channel-type.label: Last Run
channel-type.description: Last run time when provided by Rachio. Remains UNDEF when the API does not provide a usable value.

channel-type.label: Next Run
channel-type.description: Next run time when provided by Rachio. Remains UNDEF when the API does not provide a usable value.

channel-type.label: Zones
channel-type.description: Comma-separated Rachio zone IDs associated with this schedule.

channel-type.label: Seasonal Adjustment
channel-type.description: Seasonal adjustment value for the schedule rule. Sending a number updates the adjustment.

channel-type.label: Start Schedule
channel-type.description: Send ON to start this schedule rule.

channel-type.label: Skip Schedule
channel-type.description: Send ON to skip this schedule rule.

channel-type.label: Skip Forward Zone Run
channel-type.description: Send ON to skip the currently running zone in this schedule context.
